registration_number.description: Registration number (can also be referred to as application number or आयडी क्रमांक).

name_of_employer.description: Name of the employer or proprietor of the establishment.

nature_of_business.description: Nature of the business or operations carried out.

mobile_number.description: Mobile number of the employer or primary contact.

email.description: Email address of the employer or establishment.

total_employees.description: Total number of employees in the establishment.

registration_number.description: Unique registration number of the business license.

name.description: Name of the business or license holder.

address_of_business_operator.description: Residential or operational address of the business operator.

address_of_business.description: Registered address of the business establishment.

kind_of_business.description: Nature or type of business activities undertaken.

issued_on.description: Date on which the license was issued.

valid_upto.description: Validity end date of the business license.
